chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible for the Muhrim to Do and Use of All Types

text: 2695 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «لاَ بَأْسَ أَنْ يَدْخُلَ اَلْمُحْرِمُ اَلْحَمَّامَ وَ لَكِنْ لاَ يَتَدَلَّكُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2695 - Imam (as) said: "There is no harm if a person in the state of ihram enters the bathhouse, but they should not scrub themselves."
